_note: Faction claims are scenario-bound assertions, not location truth. This inventory deliberately contains no polygon geometry; a claim must pass evidence and review before it can graduate beyond points or broad regions.

scenarios.title: Legacy western claims audit
assumptions: The retired records mixed places and periods without a shared date or ending state.
Location membership alone does not establish a controlled boundary.

scenarios.title: Misfits Wendover working situation
assumptions: 2298 is the working midpoint of the existing 2296–2300 project records, not a claim about wider Fallout canon.
Presence, activity and site control do not imply continuous sovereign territory.
All three claims may overlap and remain subject to campaign review.

sources.title: Misfits world dataset 1.7
sources.note: Project-authored location and event records; suitable for the Wendover scenario only, not independent Fallout canon evidence.

sources.title: Fallout world faction map (2290 scenario)
sources.note: User-approved guide to broad visual relationships. Its selected endings, mixed continuities, pixels and exact edges are not evidence and must not be copied or cited by a claim.

uncertainty.note: No shared date, ending state or defensible extent was recorded.

evidence.note: The location records establish two places, not a contemporaneous NCR control boundary.

uncertainty.note: A Strip anchor cannot establish NCR control of the Mojave or select an ending.

evidence.note: The place identity provides no territorial extent and does not resolve competing Mojave outcomes.

uncertainty.note: The records support activity around two anchors, not a closed perimeter.

evidence.locator: locations misfits_wendover_town and misfits_toana_range_overlook; event event_ncr_caravan_attack_wendover
evidence.note: Project records describe NCR patrol, outpost and response activity near the anchors.

uncertainty.note: Mobile bands and ambush activity cannot support a stable ownership edge.

evidence.locator: location misfits_great_salt_flats; events event_ncr_caravan_attack_wendover and event_vault_breach_wendover
evidence.note: Project records describe recurring ambushes and raids across the flats without stable government.

uncertainty.note: The claim concerns a concealed facility and access area, not the surrounding flats.

evidence.note: Project records make the facility a vault-dweller origin and describe active contest over its interior.
